title: Sandbox
subtitle: Runs Io code in an isolated child state with restricted resource limits.

members.name: messageCount
members.description: Returns a number containing the messageCount limit of the Sandbox.

members.name: printCallback
members.description: default implementation is; method(string, string print)

members.name: setMessageCount
members.description: Sets the messageCount limit of the receiver.

members.name: setTimeLimit
members.description: Sets the time limit of the Sandbox.

members.name: timeLimit
members.description: Returns a number containing the time limit of calls made to the Sandbox.
